title: lobelia minutula var. rugegensis
intro: Lobelia minutula var. rugegensis, also known as the 'Small Blue Lobelia', is a plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia minutula var. rugegensis include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential in reducing stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
